name: Mushroom-Based "Functional" Coffee
description: Aggressive adoption of Cordyceps and Lion’s Mane infusions into standard filter coffee as Gen Z seeks "nootropic" productivity boosts.
indianAlternative: Filter coffee decoction, Lion’s Mane powder, jaggery, cardamom

name: Tandoori Momos Pasta
description: A hyper-regional fusion using Italian pasta shapes as a vehicle for creamy makhani-tandoori momo fillings.
indianAlternative: Whole wheat pasta with homemade tandoori masala and steamed momos

name: Pistachio-Kunafa Stuffed Medjool Dates
description: The "clean" evolution of the Dubai chocolate trend: Medjool dates stuffed with kunafa shards, pistachio and white chocolate.
indianAlternative: Medjool dates, semolina kunafa, pista, coconut sugar

name: Millet-Coconut Frozen Desserts
description: Dairy-free, low-sugar frozen desserts using indigenous millets, coconut cream and jaggery targeting the "guilt-free" Gen Z palate.
indianAlternative: Foxtail millet, coconut milk, nolen gur, roasted dry fruits

name: Desi Taco Fusion (Bajra Roti Base)
description: Mexican tacos where the tortilla is replaced by mini Bajra or Jowar rotis, stuffed with paneer bhurji and mint chutney.
indianAlternative: Bajra roti, paneer bhurji, pudina chutney

name: Makhani Ramen
description: Japanese ramen noodles served in a rich, creamy dal makhani-inspired broth, bridging East Asian and North Indian palates.
indianAlternative: Rice noodles, rajma/dal makhani gravy, achar oil

name: Ube-Style Purple Sweet Potato Desserts
description: Using Indian purple sweet potato as a near-molecular substitute for global "ube" in cheesecakes, soft-serve and milk cakes.
indianAlternative: Purple sweet potato halwa folded into milk cake or shrikhand

name: Probiotic "Achaar" Bowls
description: Western-style macro bowls that use fermented Indian pickles as a functional gut-health topping instead of kimchi.
indianAlternative: Brown rice, sprouts, dahi, mixed regional aachaars

name: Kombucha-Chai Cocktails
description: A fermented take on chai, blending kombucha fizz with masala chai aromatics in low-ABV cocktail formats.
indianAlternative: Assam CTC, kombucha starter, jaggery, masala blend

name: Doctor's Ultimate Bread
description: A high-protein bread recipe going viral for packing 10g protein per slice using nutrient-dense flour blends, positioned as the ultimate health-conscious carb.
indianAlternative: Ragi-multigrain atta bread with flaxseed, peanut flour, and jaggery glaze

name: Japanese Cheesecake
description: A massively viral 2-ingredient Japanese cheesecake taking over TikTok — jiggly, cloud-light, and requiring only cream cheese and eggs.
indianAlternative: Hung curd cheesecake with cardamom, saffron, and a digestive biscuit base

name: Paratha Burger
description: A fusion trend replacing the classic burger bun with crispy, flaky paratha — delivering buttery layers with every bite of the patty.
indianAlternative: Laccha paratha bun, spiced paneer or keema patty, mint raita, pickled onions

name: Smash Burger Tacos
description: A viral mashup that presses seasoned ground beef into a tortilla on a flat griddle, creating a crispy cheese-skirted taco that dominated GDELT news volume in February 2026.
indianAlternative: Chapati smash taco with keema, amul cheese crust, and green chutney

name: Cottage Cheese Ice Cream
description: High-protein frozen dessert blending cottage cheese, frozen fruit and honey — championed by fitness creators and picked up by mainstream food media worldwide.
indianAlternative: Paneer-based frozen kulfi with cardamom, saffron, and roasted pistachios

name: Dubai Chocolate Bar
description: Pistachio-kunafa stuffed chocolate bars originating from a Dubai confectioner that went globally viral, spawning hundreds of copycat recipes across news outlets.
indianAlternative: Kaju katli chocolate bark with crushed kunafa, pista, and desi ghee

name: Birria Ramen
description: Mexican birria consommé replaces traditional tonkotsu broth in ramen bowls — a cross-cultural fusion surging through food-media headlines.
indianAlternative: Nihari-style slow-cooked mutton broth ramen with hand-pulled noodles and mirchi oil

name: Protein Cookie Dough
description: Edible, no-bake cookie dough fortified with protein powder and chickpea flour — a gym-culture staple that crossed into mainstream news coverage.
indianAlternative: Besan-jaggery protein ladoo dough with whey, dark chocolate chips, and ghee
